description:
Svjedočanstvo sestre Emanuele Maillard - HR titlovi
Prije svog obraćenja skoro si je oduzela život. Poslušajte priču ove sestre te kako su joj magija i astrologija odvele dušu u tamu. Milošću Božjom spašena je od svog plana da se ubije jednog dana u 17h.

Sister Emmanuel's testimony
Before Sr Emmanuel became a Religious Sister, she almost took her life.  Listen to Sister's story of how she got into the ouija board and astrology that took her soul into a dark pit. By the grace of God, she was saved from her 5 o'clock death plan.

Ovaj video sa titlovima na hrvatskom preuzet je sa kanala sestre Emanuele:
https://youtube.com/channel/UCveRmNCjId_yX6zkqz9VEbQ
